recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: The Joys of a Woman
recommendations.overview: Emmanuelle returns to her husband in Hong Kong and proceeds to have several extramarital affairs -- with his knowledge, of course. Her husband's lover and American guest are both very puzzled by their openness.

recommendations.title: Midnight
recommendations.overview: A serial killer ruthlessly hunts down a deaf woman through the streets of South Korea after she witnesses his brutal crime.

recommendations.title: Il Mare
recommendations.overview: In the year 1999, a young woman leaves her quaint seaside house and returns to the city, leaving in the mailbox a card for the next owner, with instructions to forward any mail of hers to the new address. In the year 1997, a jaded young architect mov

recommendations.title: A Sun
recommendations.overview: A family of four fractures under the weight of unmet expectations, unexpected tragedy, and uncompromising pride.

recommendations.title: Chungking Express
recommendations.overview: Two melancholic Hong Kong policemen fall in love: one with a mysterious underworld figure, the other with a beautiful and ethereal server at a late-night restaurant.

recommendations.title: The Concubine
recommendations.overview: Living a torturous life of poverty and barely able to survive, Hwa-yeon decides to offer herself as one of the king’s concubines. Once inside the royal palace, two men are immediately seized by the woman - the Grand Prince Seong-won, a megalomaniacal

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension
recommendations.overview: Adventurer/surgeon/rock musician Buckaroo Banzai and his band of men, the Hong Kong Cavaliers, take on evil alien invaders from the 8th dimension.

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.
